description: Vertical, portrait-orientation quote graphic from U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services. The background is a solid medium-blue with a faint, large pale-blue opening-quotation-mark watermark in the upper left. The main content is a block quote in white sans-serif type, with select phrases bolded. It reads: '"For years, states have pleaded for tools to help identify and stop aliens from hijacking our elections," said USCIS Spokesman Matthew Tragesser. "Under the leadership of President Trump and Secretary Noem, USCIS is moving quickly to eliminate voter fraud. We expect further improvements soon and remain committed to restoring trust in American elections."' The bolded phrases are 'stop aliens', the speaker attribution 'USCIS Spokesman Matthew Tragesser' (italic bold), and 'restoring trust in American elections.' At the bottom right is the DHS/USCIS circular seal beside white text 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services.' There is no photograph.
notable_text: "For years, states have pleaded for tools to help identify and stop aliens from hijacking our elections... Under the leadership of President Trump and Secretary Noem, USCIS is moving quickly to eliminate voter fraud... restoring trust in American elections." - USCIS Spokesman Matthew Tragesser
